name: Niks Technology Limited
summary: Niks Technology Limited, an IT solution services enabling company, provides software development and educational services in India and internationally. The company offers school, hospital, real estate, hotel, retail point of sale, and tour and travel management system software solutions, as well as provides pharmacy, gym, matrimonial, food ordering, inventory saloon, and bus reservation management software solutions. It also provides IT and IT security services; and digital marketing services, such as search engine optimization and marketing, content and Influencer marketing, content automation, campaign and e-commerce marketing, email direct marketing, pay per click, online reputation management, display advertising, e-books, optical disks and games, and other forms of digital media. In addition, the company offers online and offline courses, including ethical hacking and cyber security, embedded system and robotics, digital marketing, android application development, Internet of things, machine learning, artificial intelligence, data science , PLC-SCADA, web development, software development, programming language, server administrator, VLSI designing, networking, and software testing. Further, it provides web development services, such as website design, custom web design, responsive website design, SEO friendly web design, PHP design and application development, website hosting, e-commerce web design, website support and maintenance, and website redesigning; and mobile app development services. Niks Technology Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Patna, India.
